hero.title: About BethGold Foundation
hero.subtitle: In Every Disability, There Is Ability

story.label: Our Story
story.heading: Born from a Belief That Ability Lives in Everyone
paragraphs: BethGold Foundation was founded in 2019 with a single conviction: that disability is not inability. We believe every person — regardless of background, circumstance, or ability — deserves access to education, healthcare, and the opportunity to grow.

What began as a small community outreach initiative has grown into a multi-programme NGO serving thousands of beneficiaries across multiple communities. Our work addresses the most pressing challenges faced by vulnerable populations: lack of educational resources, limited access to healthcare, food insecurity, and the social barriers that hold young people back from reaching their potential.

We are proud to be a registered NGO, accountable to the communities we serve and to every individual who places their trust in us. Every donation, every volunteer hour, and every partnership we forge goes directly toward creating lasting, measurable change.
story.imageAlt: BethGold Foundation community members working together

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.heading: To empower communities through sustainable initiatives that improve quality of life.
mission.description: We deliver targeted programmes in education, health, food security, and youth empowerment — creating pathways out of vulnerability and toward lasting self-sufficiency.
mission.icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-5 h-5' fill='none' viewBox='0 0 24 24' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><path stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' d='M3 21v-4m0 0V5a2 2 0 012-2h6.5l1 1H21l-3 6 3 6h-8.5l-1-1H5a2 2 0 00-2 2zm9-13.5V9' /></svg>

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.heading: A society where everyone has access to opportunities for growth and wellbeing.
vision.description: We envision a world where disability, poverty, and inequality no longer determine a person's future — where every community has the tools and the support to write its own story of progress.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We hold ourselves to the highest standards of honesty and accountability in everything we do.

coreValues.title: Compassion
coreValues.description: We listen, we care, and we act with empathy — treating every beneficiary with dignity and respect.
coreValues.icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-6 h-6' fill='none' viewBox='0 0 24 24' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><path stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' d='M4.318 6.318a4.5 4.5 0 000 6.364L12 20.364l7.682-7.682a4.5 4.5 0 00-6.364-6.364L12 7.636l-1.318-1.318a4.5 4.5 0 00-6.364 0z' /></svg>

coreValues.title: Empowerment
coreValues.description: We invest in people — not just providing resources, but building skills, confidence, and self-reliance.
coreValues.icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-6 h-6' fill='none' viewBox='0 0 24 24' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><path stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' d='M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z' /></svg>

coreValues.title: Transparency
coreValues.description: We openly share our impact, our finances, and our decisions with the communities and donors who trust us.
coreValues.icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' class='w-6 h-6' fill='none' viewBox='0 0 24 24' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><path stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' d='M15 12a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z' /><path stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' d='M2.458 12C3.732 7.943 7.523 5 12 5c4.478 0 8.268 2.943 9.542 7-1.274 4.057-5.064 7-9.542 7-4.477 0-8.268-2.943-9.542-7z' /></svg>

coreValues.title: Collaboration
coreValues.description: We believe meaningful change is built together — with communities, partners, and volunteers united in purpose.

cta.label: Join Us
cta.heading: Be Part of the Change
cta.subtitle: Whether you donate, volunteer, or partner with us — your involvement creates real impact in real lives.
